name: DS3
description: Compact crossover SUV featuring unique styling and available as a three-door or five-door model.

name: DS4
description: Sporty compact crossover SUV with a distinctive coupe-like design.

name: DS5
description: Luxury compact crossover SUV with an elegant and spacious interior.

name: DS7 Crossback
description: Midsize luxury crossover SUV with a sleek and modern design.

name: DS8
description: Luxury full-sized crossover SUV offering high levels of comfort and technology.

name: DS9
description: Concept car unveiled at the 2018 Mondial de l'Automobile show in Paris, featuring a striking design and advanced technologies.

name: Citroën DS
description: Iconic car series introduced by Citroën in 1955, which laid the foundation for DS Automobiles.

name: Citroën CX
description: Luxury sedan produced by Citroën from 1974 to 1991, featuring the brand's hydropneumatic suspension system.

name: Citroën XM
description: Executive sedan produced by Citroën from 1989 to 2000, known for its advanced technology and aerodynamic design.

name: Citroën DS4
description: Compact crossover SUV produced by Citroën from 2010 to 2015, sharing the name with the original DS series but not part of the current DS Automobiles lineup.

name: Citroën C6
description: Executive sedan produced by Citroën from 2005 to 2012, not part of the current DS Automobiles lineup.
